commit.message:
feat: intelligent reminder lead time based on task type

- Meeting/appointment: remind 30 min before (not at start time)
- Payment/bills: remind 3 days before
- Deadline/submission: remind 1 day before
- Travel/flight: remind 2 hours before
- Medical appointment: remind 1 hour before
- Other timed tasks: remind 15 min before
- No time specified: remind at 9am on due date

Also: reminder confirmation always shows actual remind time vs due time

httpRequestFromUrl(String) correctly parses URL into HttpService + path.

repository.name: burp-wrapper
repository.description: Python wrapper for Burp Suite MCP Server API — gives AI agents full access to every Burp tool

commit.message:
Biotech Scanner: quality over quantity — stricter catalyst filtering

Problem: 520+ hits because almost every biotech stock with any news
passed the quick filter. Most hits had zero FDA catalysts.

Changes:
- Quick filter: require catalyst_score > 0 OR momentum >= 6 (was <= 2)
- Sentiment neutral/mixed: 0 pts instead of 2 (no signal = no bonus)
- Quality gate: with catalyst min 20 pts, without catalyst min 35 pts
- Clinical trials API only called when real catalyst signal exists
- Same logic applied to both Full Scan and Quick Scan

Expected: ~30-80 quality hits instead of 520+ noise

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix max_contracts reading from wrong source (trader row DEFAULT 10 instead of per-account JSON)

recorder_service.py line 1379: changed from trader_dict.get('max_contracts') to
acct.get('max_contracts', 0). The trader row column had DEFAULT 10, silently capping
every trader at 10 contracts. The per-account JSON (enabled_accounts) has the user's
actual setting. This follows the same pattern as multiplier at line 1288.

Bug: DEMO4444455 and 1321127 blocked on DCA signal 2 with "Max contracts reached (10/10)"
despite no user ever setting a max contracts limit.

fix: sync monthly entries (salaries) to Supabase + add logo SVGs

Monthly store was only writing to localStorage, never to Supabase.
When realtime triggered loadFromSupabase, it overwrote local data with
empty Supabase data — causing salary/balance data loss.

Added syncMonthlyEntryToSupabase to sync bridge with debounced writes.
Also added new logo SVGs (favicon, icon, full with text).

commit.message:
fix: cleanup unused catch params, anti double-click on forms

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: cross-chain weighted-price volatility for RSC

Replace single-price tracking with equal-weighted average of
sqrtPriceX96 across all monitored chains (Eth Sepolia, Base Sepolia,
Unichain Sepolia). Acts as an implicit cross-chain oracle: noise on
a single chain is dampened, but correlated moves are captured immediately.

- Add monitoredChainIds[] storage and chainPrices mapping
- Compute weighted average in _computeWeightedPrice()

Add CSRF token protection across all write endpoints

Generates per-session CSRF tokens using timing-safe hash_equals validation.
Tokens are delivered via meta tag for AJAX (X-CSRF-Token header) and hidden
form field for login POST. All 16 Add/Update/Delete AJAX endpoints now
reject requests with missing or invalid tokens.

commit.message:
⚡ Optimize avatar videos: 4K→1080p, fix preload cache miss

- Re-encode all avatar videos from 2160x3840 to 1080x1920 (retina-crisp
  at max 450px container). Total reduction: ~56MB → ~22MB (69% smaller).
- Fix preloading: replace detached <video> elements with <link rel="preload">
  so browser cache is shared with the playback element, avoiding double downloads.

refactor: deep review fixes — error handling, sync, timestamps, SW cleanup

P0 fixes:
- syncBridge: add retry (1x after 1s) + toast error on Supabase write failures
- syncBridge: debounce writes per item (300ms) to prevent Supabase spam
- syncBridge: add syncCategoryRule/deleteCategoryRule for category_rules table
- chargesStore: category rules now sync to Supabase via syncBridge
- ErrorBoundary: simplified — chunk errors handled by lazyRetry() in App.jsx
- main.jsx: removed duplicate error/unhandledrejection handlers (lazyRetry handles it)
- ChargesPage/SavingsPage: add submitting state to prevent double-click on forms

P1 fixes:
- All stores: add updatedAt timestamps on every add/update/toggle action
- syncItem: always adds updated_at to Supabase writes for conflict tracking
- syncItem/deleteItem: now throw on error (caught by syncBridge retry/toast)
- Realtime: listen to category_rules table + households table
- Supabase migration: add updated_at columns to all 6 data tables
- Enable realtime on households + category_rules tables

Bump APP_VERSION to 4.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix 'Not authenticated' error: map token.sub to session.user.id

The JWT callback stored role/employeeId/tenantId but never mapped
token.sub back to session.user.id, causing getSessionUserId() to
throw in report actions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix tab/shift+tab cursor jumping up on long notes (#20)

The repositionCursor function was calling CursorDown() a fixed number
of times equal to the target logical line index. However, Bubble Tea's
CursorDown() moves by visual (soft-wrapped) rows, not logical lines.
On long notes with wrapped lines, this caused the cursor to fall short
of the target line — appearing to jump up several lines after indenting.

Fix by looping until Line() reaches the target logical line, which
correctly traverses any number of wrapped visual rows per logical line.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01NgAkSnHZpMEkXzztCGXqC5

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
버그 수정: workflow status 137 (OOM) 오류 해결

entrypoint.sh가 컨테이너 시작 시 migrate + collectstatic을 자동 실행하는데,
workflow에서도 동일 명령을 중복 실행하여 메모리 부족 → SIGKILL(종료코드 137) 발생.

- 중복 migrate / collectstatic docker exec 명령 제거
- sleep 30으로 entrypoint.sh 초기화 완료 대기
- docker image prune -f → docker image prune -f || true (실패 무시)
- 컨테이너 최근 로그(tail 10) 출력 추가

- Replace Modal /video-trim calls with local ffmpeg in video swap processor
- extractKeyFrame: local ffmpeg -vframes 1 instead of Modal trim
- postProcessVideo: local ffmpeg copy/re-encode instead of Modal trim
- faceSwapVideo: download source video + face image from R2, convert to base64

commit.message:
fix: auto-migrate old apiUrl for existing users (v0.1.4)

Users who ran `orfc login` on v0.1.2 have `apiUrl: "https://orfc.dev"`
baked into their config. The new default doesn't help because the saved
value overrides it. loadConfig() now auto-corrects the naked domain to
https://www.orfc.dev in memory, fixing auth for all existing users
without requiring manual config changes.
